meaning: n.短剑,匕首vt.用剑(或匕首)刺
examples: He drew his dagger and turned to face his pursuers.
Peter felt for his dagger till his hand gripped it.
Though he was finally acquitted of the charges, the scandal put a dagger in his career.
Burke made two threes including the dagger-for-the-ages swish that sent the game to OT.
